disagreements.text:
2.5 Direct communication may sometimes follow consultation, the complainant
seeking the advice of on...
disagreements.llm_reasoning: The text does not contain a deontic operator or clear obligation, permission, or prohibition.

disagreements.text:
If two or more students compete for a position and they are equally qualified to undertake
the work,...
disagreements.llm_reasoning: The text specifies an obligation (who should receive preference) and has actionable requirements (preference given to certain students).

disagreements.text:
Notes of the interview will be recorded and
should be agreed upon by all parties.
disagreements.llm_reasoning: The text uses 'should', which is often advisory but in this context implies an obligation for all parties to agree upon the notes of the interview.

disagreements.text:
The appeal should be
addressed to the Vice President for Academic Affairs.
disagreements.llm_reasoning: The text uses 'should', which is advisory but in this context implies an obligation to address the appeal to a specific individual.
